        COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
    FROM Orders

WITH ProductOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_id,
        p.product_name,
        p.product_price,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS order_count
    FROM Products p
    LEFT JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_price
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(order_count) AS max_order_count
    FROM ProductOrderCounts
)
SELECT 
    poc.product_id,
    poc.product_name,
    poc.product_price
FROM ProductOrderCounts poc
CROSS JOIN MaxCount mc
WHERE poc.order_count = mc.max_order_count
ORDER BY poc.product_id;

    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'

StudentDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.Lname,
        COALESCE(dd.distance, 0) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN Linda l
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd 
        ON (dd.city1_code = l.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)

FROM StudentDistances
ORDER BY distance DESC

    SELECT 
        Sender, 
        COUNT(*) AS PackageCount
    FROM Package
